mentions.note: Up 93% in 2025; semiconductor equipment maker riding data center memory demand. At this cycle point, orders likely to continue accumulating due to capacity scarcity. Essential to chip production ramp.
Chip equipment manufacturer rallying on strong demand for tools to make memory chips as industry races to expand capacity.
Semiconductor equipment supplier rallied hard as Taiwan Semi's $50B capex validates continued equipment demand from foundries.
Semiconductor capital equipment maker; essential for fab buildout; strong stock benefiting from equipment demand.
Incredibly well-run semiconductor capital equipment maker; can nibble 15-20 shares after down days; essential for memory supply ramp; avoid top.
Semiconductor equipment supplier; machinery in short supply; buyers taking stock every day; supports extended shortage dynamic.
Semiconductor equipment maker; machinery in short supply alongside memory chips, supporting continued shortage and price power.

Semiconductor capital equipment maker in shortage game; hold through Intel volatility.
Semiconductor capital equipment maker up 29-39% since January; positioned for consistent orders as Micron, Taiwan Semi, Intel all expanding production capacity through multi-year cycle.

Semiconductor equipment supplier crushed in program rout despite excellent fundamentals. Treat as artificial dislocation, not fundamental deterioration.
Eighth-best performer (+31.8%); DuPont spin-off; Cramer trust holding; makes materials for semiconductor production; reported blowout quarter; one of Cramer's favorite new stocks.
Semi cap equipment; memory shortage tailwind. Less risky than direct memory plays. Buyable on pullback.
Chip inspection/process control; hardware AI capex tailwind.
Semiconductor equipment; Cramer's top 3 order: Lam, AMAT, KLA. Essential IP for alleviating shortages.
